title: Mutual aid activities; labor organizations
doc_html:
§1406.  Mutual aid activities; labor organizations

This Chapter does not apply to employees engaged in collective bargaining activities for their mutual aid and protection, or the activities of labor organizations or their members or agents.  

Acts 1990, No. 230, §1.
